Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Western Garage Doors CA to get the job done right.

“Our garage door spring broke on a Saturday morning. Western Garage Doors CA came out within a couple of hours and had it fixed quickly. The technician was professional and explained everything clearly. Great service!”

Maria S. Garage Door Repair
Mar 15, 2025

“We recently had Western Garage Doors CA install a new garage door at our home in Land Park. The installation went smoothly, and the door looks great. There was a small issue with the opener, but they came back and fixed it promptly.”

David K. Garage Door Installation
Feb 28, 2025

“My garage door opener stopped working unexpectedly. Western Garage Doors CA was able to diagnose and repair the problem quickly and efficiently. The technician was knowledgeable and courteous.”

Jessica L. Garage Door Opener Repair
Dec 10, 2024

“We hired Western Garage Doors CA for annual garage door maintenance. They did a thorough job inspecting and lubricating all the moving parts. Our garage door is now operating much smoother and quieter.”

Robert B. Garage Door Maintenance
Nov 5, 2024

“The garage door spring broke on my single car garage. The tech arrived on time, was friendly, and replaced the spring efficiently. The price was fair, and I'm happy with the service.”

Susan M. Garage Door Spring Replacement
Oct 20, 2024

“From the initial consultation to the final installation, the team at Western Garage Doors CA was fantastic. They helped us design a custom garage door that perfectly complements our home's style. The quality of the workmanship is excellent.”

Michael P. Custom Garage Door Installation
Sep 12, 2024
Western Garage Doors CA

Trusted garage door installer professionals serving Sacramento, CA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
